title: Explore using Lightning CSS instead of PostCSS in core (or as an option)
body:
### Description

I was developing a project with ViteJS and needed to integrate [Lightning CSS](https://lightningcss.dev/) as the CSS parser. I couldn't able to find any plugin for its integration.



### Suggested solution

Will love to see, if you create a plugin for its support.

### Alternative

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

### Validations

- [X] Follow our [Code of Conduct](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [X] Read the [Contributing Guidelines](https://github.com/vitejs/vite/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [X] Read the [docs](https://vitejs.dev/guide).
- [X] Check that there isn't already an issue that request the same feature to avoid creating a duplicate.
